answer_text: print 兩個 hello (excel後不會執行最後一行的print done)
fork(): generate child process; excel():transfer function to print "hello", and final print "done".
parent 和children的process or function都會被改成echo and terminate, after that the system will print done.
hellohello    該程式只會輸出兩個hello，因為excel會取代程式碼，所以後面的printf("done\n")根本不會被執行，parent process和child process都只執行到execl那行，各自輸出一個hello就結束了
Two processes print done. Thus, done is printed twice.
child 會輸出 hello, 本身會輸出 done
兩個程式code都改成/bin/echo的程式，原本printf不會產生。
excel 抹去fork的內容，執行''/bin/echo'', print: done
P0: hello, print:done; P1 hello, print: done
